reasoning: Zootopia 2 releases on November 26, 2025, giving it only 35 days to accumulate domestic calendar gross in 2025. Typically, the #1 grossing film of a calendar year earns $400M-$700M+ domestically (e.g., Inside Out 2, Barbie, Top Gun: Maverick). The original Zootopia grossed $341M domestically in its entire theatrical run. Asking the sequel to exceed the full run of the original in just 35 days, while also outpacing all major 2025 summer blockbuster releases (such as Jurassic World Rebirth, Superman, and Minecraft), is extremely unlikely. Therefore, the chance of it being the highest calendar grosser of 2025 is very small.
